actorScopes.partner-owner: partner_id and store scope derived from authenticated actor
actorScopes.control-operator: explicit partner governance permissions and tenant scope

negativeInvariants: field agent cannot read or mutate another field agent partner draft
partner owner cannot approve or publish itself
generic link route cannot reassign an owned store
client cannot read private onboarding or payout data
stale version and divergent idempotency replay are rejected
